import api from"./api";// CREATE
export const createAppointment=data=>{return api.post("/appointments",data);};// GET
export const getAppointment=id=>{return api.get(`/appointments/${id}`);};// UPDATE
export const updateAppointment=(id,data)=>{return api.put(`/appointments/${id}`,data);};// DELETE
export const cancelAppointment=id=>{return api.delete(`/appointments/${id}`);};export const getAllAppointments=()=>{return axios.get(BASE_URL,{headers:{Authorization:localStorage.getItem("token")}});};
